summary: Build M2 map rendering, zoom, selection, and modes over read models
acceptance_criteria: The web client renders the M2 30 District/10 Settlement fixture through read models and MapRenderer deltas rather than direct WorldState imports.
Map interactions include zoom, district/settlement selection, and at least the M2-relevant map modes for seasonal/economy/route inspection.
Pixi DisplayObjects remain presentation cache only; React does not manage one DisplayObject per map entity and cannot mutate authoritative simulation state.
Route previews and selected district details are derived from protocol/read-model data, not duplicated domain formulas in UI code.
Storybook or Playwright coverage exercises map load, zoom, selection, mode switching, and renderer rebuild from read model.
No sim-core rule implementation, Electron IPC expansion, or production dependency is added without approved review.
required_tests: Storybook story or Playwright test covers M2 map zoom, selection, and mode switching.
node -e JSON parse/shape check for M2-CLIENT-MAP-001
notes: This task must keep the sim-core/React/Pixi boundary intact.
If map rendering needs new public protocol shape, coordinate with systems_architect before broad UI work.
Lead-owned goal-mode, model-routing, and thread-registry updates are allowed only as orchestration recovery evidence for this task; they must not expand implementation scope.
